statement: In every magma, Equation 456 (`x = x * (y * (z * (z * z)))`) implies Equation 1229 (`x = x * (((x * y) * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0650
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op y (op z (op z z))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op x (op (op (op x y) x) y))
